form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished last on April 3 over 400m at Geelong behind Paw Estrella beaten 12 lengths (23.32) in a Grade 4/5. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished last on April 3 over 400m at Geelong behind Paw Estrella beaten 12 lengths (23.32) in a Grade 4/5. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Won his last three in a row including a narrow win last start over 350m at this track by half a length in a Free For All. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last three in a row including a narrow win last start over 350m at this track by half a length in a Free For All. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at The Meadows over 525m in 30.34 last start, beating Whisky Bella. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at The Meadows over 525m in 30.34 last start, beating Whisky Bella. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Colliding and fell in catching pen.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 6 over 450m at Shepparton in a Grade 5. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 6 over 450m at Shepparton in a Grade 5. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at final run of last campaign, finishing second (21.75) at Warrnambool before going for a four-and-a-half months spell. Super consistent fresh, having never missed the frame from three starts. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at final run of last campaign, finishing second (21.75) at Warrnambool before going for a four-and-a-half months spell. Super consistent fresh, having never missed the frame from three starts. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 19.53 when second at this track latest but the run prior he clocked a lightning 19.53 over 350m finishing third at this track. Can measure up if runs up to recent best times.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has placed the last couple. Ran 19.53 when second at this track latest but the run prior he clocked a lightning 19.53 over 350m finishing third at this track. Can measure up if runs up to recent best times.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 1.5 lengths at Q Parklands (30.05) beating Jumping Jive in a Grade 3/4 on March 15. Others have better credentials.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 1.5 lengths at Q Parklands (30.05) beating Jumping Jive in a Grade 3/4 on March 15. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Could manage only sixth last time but impressed the start prior when he was an impressive winner scoring by a neck in a Special conditions race at this track and recording a lightning 16.32 for the 300m journey. Hard to top on the time from two back.
